import React, { useState } from 'react'; import './index.css'; function Login({ onLogin }) { const [view, setView] = useState('landing'); const [role, setRole] = useState('buyer'); const [animating, setAnimating] = useState(false); const [slideDir, setSlideDir] = useState('right'); const navigate = (nextView, dir = 'left') => { if (animating) return; setAnimating(true); setSlideDir(dir); setTimeout(() => { setView(nextView); setAnimating(false); }, 400); }; const handleAuth = () => { onLogin({ role }); }; const roleSlide = role === 'buyer' ? 0 : 50; return (
